Press Release: Valerie writes to Public Bodies to Support Walsall Leather Museum

Posted: 18/11/2025

Walsall Council Cabinet decided on 24 September 2025 to sell Walsall Leather Museum to Walsall College. Despite it being ‘called-in’, the Council confirmed their decision on 14 October 2025 against

Valerie Raises Governance and Accountability of Public Bodies in Westminster Hall

Posted: 12/11/2025

I secured a debate in Westminster Hall on 12 November 2025:

That this House has considered the governance and accountability of Public Bodies.

Here is the text of my full speech:

Press Release: Valerie Urges Diligent Scrutiny Over Leather Museum Relocation Plans

Posted: 14/10/2025

Walsall Council Cabinet’s decision on 24 September 2025 to close Walsall Leather Museum has outraged everyone interested in heritage.

This decision was called in, to be reviewed on 14 October 2025.

Continue reading →

My constituents and I are astonished that the Cabinet of Walsall MBC will agree to a report at their meeting on Wednesday 24 September 2025 to close the Leather Museum

To Contact Valerie

Please click the link below and complete the form with all your details so your case can be processed.

Contact form

Surgeries

Valerie holds regular surgeries which  are currently by telephone.

If you wish to contact Valerie, please use the contact form on the website or email Valerie at [email protected] or telephone on 01922 635835. You can call Monday-Friday 10:30 am to 1:00pm.

Next surgery: 17 April 2026 at 2pm

Claimant Rate in Walsall and Bloxwich

Figures published today show that in March 2026:

There were 6,065 claimants in Walsall and Bloxwich constituency, which was 7.7% of the population aged 16-64. The equivalent UK claimant rate was 4.0%.

Number of claimants was down 335 from last year.

There were 1,320 claimants aged 18-24.
